evidence_snippet: Kentucky Justice Online identifies itself as free legal help for Kentuckians and preserves statewide legal-help routing, including Apply For Free Help, Help Near You, and named Kentucky legal-aid organizations such as AppalReD Legal Aid, Kentucky Legal Aid, Legal Aid of the Bluegrass, and Legal Aid Society.
review_notes: This is a statewide legal-help and referral surface, not just a single-region legal-aid office.
The page preserves both statewide intake language and the named regional legal-aid organizations it routes families to.
